use_cases: Showcasing product features with images on SaaS landing pages
Displaying service offerings with visual cards and descriptions
Presenting key capabilities with call-to-action links
Highlighting benefits section for software platforms
Feature comparison sections for product marketing
ai_summary: A responsive feature showcase component displaying multiple feature cards with images, titles, and descriptions. Includes a heading, descriptive text, and a CTA link with hover animation. Built with Tailwind CSS and supports customizable feature items, commonly used on SaaS landing pages to highlight product capabilities.
